rows.reason: Assistive side panels must inherit embedded accessibility, reduced-motion, announcement, focus, and host-return guarantees rather than creating parallel UI law.
Assistive invocation eligibility cannot assume embedded patient context until Phase 7 proves trusted context, SSO, and same-shell recovery.
Assistive telemetry disclosure and trainability flags need their own Phase 8 freeze even after Phase 7 publishes privacy-safe channel telemetry.
Assurance ledgers may not claim channel completeness until Phase 7 monthly and limited-release evidence is generated from validated event contracts.
Operations and assurance boards must consume active route freezes and kill-switch states as first-class evidence.
Phase 9 must freeze graph admissibility rules before using Phase 7 evidence in audit, retention, replay, or pack export.
